titleRomaji: MEKAKUCITY RELOAD
titleNative: MEKAKUCITY RELOAD
synopsis: The four-part Niconico streaming program "Seek at Mekakucity," which began on August 7 and featured Kagerou Project characters, ended on Tuesday with an announcement that the franchise will get "more anime." The end of the video reveals a tentative title for a new anime: "Mekakucity Reload." (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Tai-Ari deshita.: Ojou-sama wa Kakutou Game nante Shinai
titleRomaji: Tai-Ari deshita.: Ojou-sama wa Kakutou Game nante Shinai
titleNative: 対ありでした。 ～お嬢さまは格闘ゲームなんてしない～
synonyms: GGWP.: Young Ladies Don't Play Fighting Games
synopsis: Kuromi Girls’ Academy is a refined, elegant school that expects the very best in deportment from its young ladies. Aya got into this peerless rich-girls’ institution on a scholarship, and hopes to grow as lovely as her fellow student and idol Shirayui. But Shirayui hides a terrible secret: she’s a trash-talking, combo-chaining, newbie-stomping, ruthless hardcore gamer! Could a mutual indulgence in no-holds-barred video game combat grow into a deeper rapport between these two girls? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: GATE 2: Jieitai Kano Umi nite, Kaku Tatakaeri
titleRomaji: GATE 2: Jieitai Kano Umi nite, Kaku Tatakaeri
titleNative: GATE ２ ―自衛隊 彼の海にて、斯く戦えり―
synonyms: Gate Season 2: Thus the JSDF Fought in Their Seas!
GATE SEASON2 自衛隊 彼の海にて、斯く戦えり
synopsis: Thanks to the efforts of Lieutenant Yoji Itami (now Lieutenant First Class) of the Japan Ground Self-Defense Force, the once-closed "GATE" has safely reopened. The Japanese government, determined to maintain exclusive control over the "GATE", continues mobilizing the Self-Defense Forces for political and topographical surveys to build a peaceful relationship with the inhabitants of the Special Region. Captain First Class Edajima Goro of the Japan Maritime Self-Defense Force (JMSDF) and his subordinate, Petty Officer Second Class Tokushima Hajime, a skilled former chef, were conducting such diplomatic and investigative missions, traveling across the various nations of the Special Region. However, one day, their assignment suddenly escalates when they're tasked with a special mission to rescue an American journalist kidnapped on an island in the Special Region's Blue Sea. Immediately boarding the JMSDF Oyashio-class submarine Kitashio, they set sail into the ocean of another world, disco

title: Hotaru no Yomeiri
titleRomaji: Hotaru no Yomeiri
titleNative: ホタルの嫁入り
synopsis: On the surface, Satoko has it all—she’s beautiful, the daughter of a nobleman, and at a prime age for marriage. Unfortunately, she is also quite ill and only has a short time left to live. Before she can secure a marriage that will redeem her worth in her family’s eyes, she finds herself the target of the mysterious assassin Shinpei, and her plans are put in jeopardy. In order to save herself, she makes a desperate proposal—of marriage! When it comes to love, however, Shinpei takes “until death do we part” seriously. (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Sayonara Lara
titleRomaji: Sayonara Lara
titleNative: さよなら ララ
synopsis: All because of "love" Announced and revealed at Anime Central 2024's "Kinema Citrus Sweet 16: My Happy Marriage and What's New" panel, this anime follows a mermaid who makes a forbidden wish to be loved by a human. Following her death, she is reborn 200 years later into modern-day Japan in Lake Biwa, where she learns to adjust in a human world. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title: Yani Neko
titleRomaji: Yani Neko
titleNative: ヤニねこ
synopsis: Yani is a catgirl with a seriously bad smoking habit. She smokes so much that her apartment smells like ash and is littered with cigarette butts—and plenty of other trash! Every time she tries to quit, she becomes weak to the cravings and gives in almost instantly. Will she ever get her life together, or is she doomed to live as a chainsmoking slob forever? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Though I Am an Inept Villainess
titleRomaji: Futsutsuka na Akujo de wa Gozaimasu ga: Suuguu Chouso Torikae Den
titleEnglish: Though I Am an Inept Villainess
titleNative: ふつつかな悪女ではございますが ~雛宮蝶鼠とりかえ伝~
synonyms: Though I Am an Inept Villainess: Tale of the Butterfly-Rat Body Swap in the Maiden Court
synopsis: As maidens from the Five Clans battle for the Crown Prince’s heart, jealous Keigetsu uses forbidden magic to swap bodies with the beloved Reirin. Switching places does not guarantee happiness for Keigetsu with her new body's ill health leaving her hanging on the verge of death. Meanwhile, Reirin, now wearing the face of a scorned outcast, must answer for Keigetsu’s crimes in a dangerous trial. The unlikely pair become increasingly entangled in each other’s lives and they will need to work together to survive after discovering the dark conspiracies brewing beneath the palace's genial surface. To confront the deadly threats lurking in the shadows, Reirin must embrace her new identity and defy their expectations of the court's inept villainess. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Otherworldly Munchkin: Let's Speedrun the Dungeon with Only 1 HP!
titleRomaji: Isekai Munchkin: HP 1 no Mama de Saikyou Saisoku Dungeon Kouryaku
titleEnglish: Otherworldly Munchkin: Let's Speedrun the Dungeon with Only 1 HP!
titleNative: 異世界マンチキン ―HP1のままで最強最速ダンジョン攻略―
synopsis: 16-year-old Yukito Kirihara lives with his 14-year-old sister Sana, who he treasures more than anyone else. But when an ogre shows up outside of his window looking for Sana (a shocking event in its own right), Yukito leaps to save her—and is killed. He's offered the promise of reincarnation by a mysterious woman, who gives him a character sheet in a mysterious book. But when Yukito sees Sana in there, too, he sets off to find her, and save them both—even if he only has 1 hp with which to do it! (Source: Kodansha USA)
